description: A safety officer on a site walk notices an excavation over 5 feet deep that lacks proper shoring or sloping.

nodes.task_description: Identify the non-compliant excavation and immediately issue a stop-work order for that area.

expected_outcome.expected: Work in the hazardous area is halted.

nodes.task_description: Log the hazard in the safety system, citing the specific OSHA violation for excavation safety.

expected_outcome.expected: A new hazard is logged with the correct regulatory reference.

nodes.task_description: Assign a corrective action to the site superintendent to install proper shoring before work can resume.

expected_outcome.expected: A corrective action is assigned to the responsible party.
